account_name: # account_name          REQUIRED — Must match the account_name in contracts.csv
# contract_start_date   REQUIRED — Must match the start_date of the contract in contracts.csv (YYYY-MM-DD)
#                                  This is how the importer links items to the correct contract.
# description           REQUIRED — Free-text line item label (e.g. "Enterprise Plan"
# quantity              REQUIRED — Number of units (e.g. number of branches for per-branch pricing)
# unit_price            REQUIRED — Price per unit per period (in local currency
#                                  If payment_plan = Yearly  → price per YEAR
#                                  If payment_plan = Quarterly → price per QUARTER
#                                  If payment_plan = OneTime  → one-off total price
# payment_plan          REQUIRED — One of: Yearly | Quarterly | OneTime
# discount_pct                   — Percentage discount on this line (e.g. 10 = 10%). Leave blank for no discount.
# line_total = quantity × unit_price × (1 − discount_pct / 100)
# For MRR analytics the system uses:
#   Yearly:    line_total / 12   = monthly MRR contribution
#   Quarterly: line_total / 3    = monthly MRR contribution
#   OneTime:   line_total        = recorded as contract value only (no MRR)
